evidence_summary: Establish the historical weight of the Monkey King's lineage through a narrative transition during aerial transit. The scene must balance the kinetic energy of flight with the heavy, melancholic tone of the backstory being shared.
While flying high above the landscape, the Monkey King tells Dorothy the story of how his people were cursed by the sorceress Gayelette to obey the Golden Cap after a prank gone wrong.
Exhilaration $\rightarrow$ Melancholy/Understanding.
High energy flight with characters exhilarated by movement.
Somber atmosphere as the weight of the curse is revealed.
The Monkey King recounts the curse of Gayelette while in transit.
